data.name: MenuGiris.sssKulOl
data.value: How Do I Become a User?

data.name: Layout.InstitutionName
data.value: TKDK - Agriculture and Rural Development Support Institution

data.name: YeniKullanici.SozlesmeMetni
data.value: I accept that the information I entered will be stored in the system and used during application processes.

data.name: Home.DogrulamaBilgi
data.value: Enter the verification code sent to your email address.

data.name: Home.Hata.IslemSirasindaHata
data.value: An error occurred during the operation.

data.name: Home.Hata.KullaniciKodSifreHatali
data.value: User ID or password is incorrect.

data.name: Home.Bilgi.DogrulamaKoduGonderildi
data.value: The verification code has been sent to your email address.

data.name: Basvuru.Index.Description
data.value: You can track pre-applications, applications and finalized application records on this screen.

data.name: Denetleme.Index.Description
data.value: Review pre-application records in auditor view.

data.name: Basvuru.Form.ApplicationNoPending
data.value: Created after the first section is saved

data.name: Basvuru.Warning.FirstSectionRequired
data.value: Other sections remain disabled until the first section is saved and a pre-application ID is created.

data.name: Basvuru.Warning.FinancialRange
data.value: At least one of the latest year net sales revenue or total assets must be between TRY 100 million and TRY 4 billion.

data.name: Basvuru.Js.LockedMessage
data.value: Other sections cannot be opened before the first section is saved and a pre-application ID is received.

data.name: Basvuru.Step.3
data.value: Value Chain - Province-based selection and stages

data.name: Basvuru.Step.4
data.value: Investment Information - Address and expense types

data.name: Basvuru.Section1.Description
data.value: Application period, application subject, company and application-specific contact information.

data.name: Basvuru.Section6.Title
data.value: 2. Applicant's Own Financial Data and Scale Check

data.name: Basvuru.Field.BelgeGruplari
data.value: Required document groups in the document package

data.name: Basvuru.Options.ValueChains
data.value: Fruit-vegetable|Milk and dairy products|Meat and meat products|Aquaculture|Medicinal aromatic plants

data.name: Basvuru.Options.DocumentGroups
data.value: Trade registry and activity documents|Financial statements|Signature circular|Investment site documents|Project/technical documents

data.name: Basvuru.Message.NotFound
data.value: Pre-application record could not be found.

data.name: Basvuru.Flow.Note
data.value: This record is received as a pre-application and can be converted into an application after review.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.Description
data.value: If machinery-equipment or construction work is requested, the related preliminary list must be completed before submitting the application. For construction works, only the building/construction preliminary list is collected.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.NoList
data.value: No PIKK preliminary list is required because machinery-equipment or construction work expense was not selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.EquipmentNote
data.value: Enter the name and intended use for each requested machinery/equipment item.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.ConstructionNote
data.value: Enter the name and intended use for each requested building/construction work item.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.EquipmentRequired
data.value: Because machinery-equipment expense is selected, at least one machinery/equipment row must include a name and intended use.

data.name: Basvuru.Pikk.ConstructionRequired
data.value: Because construction work expense is selected, at least one building/construction row must include a name and intended use.

data.name: Basvuru.Section.TaahhutBeyan.Description
data.value: The declaration and commitment document from the application guide annex is uploaded in this section.

data.name: Basvuru.Section.Placeholder
data.value: This section has been separated according to the new form flow; field details will be added.

data.name: Basvuru.Firma.NotFound
data.value: Company not found. Would you like to add a new company?

data.name: Basvuru.Firma.CreateQuestion
data.value: Company not found. Would you like to add a new company?

data.name: Basvuru.Firma.ModalInfo
data.value: Company details are stored on the company record; application contact details remain application-specific.

data.name: Basvuru.Firma.SelectFirst
data.value: Please query and select a company first.

data.name: Basvuru.Options.SiteStatuses
data.value: Ownership|Lease|Allocation|Easement right|Organized industrial / specialized zone allocation|Other

data.name: Basvuru.Options.BuildingPermitStatuses
data.value: Building permit available|Building permit application submitted|Letter stating no permit is required is available|Not yet obtained|No construction work

data.name: Basvuru.InvestmentPurpose.Help
data.value: Describe the planned investment, its purpose, the main inputs to be used, the activities to be carried out, and the expected outputs such as product, service, capacity, quality, efficiency, or market access. Briefly state the contribution the investment will provide to the enterprise and the relevant value chain.

data.name: enumUygulamaAdresiYapiRuhsatiDurumu_3
data.value: Letter stating no permit is required is available

data.name: Basvuru.Options.RequiredDocumentGroups
data.value: Criminal record certificate|Income statement|Balance sheet|Certificate stating no bankruptcy, concordat or liquidation process|Trade registry gazette (incorporation and current)|Notarized signature circular

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.Description
data.value: Required documents will be uploaded as a single document package. Declarations and commitments included in the application guide annex will also be added as a separate file.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.PackageUploadNote
data.value: After the file is uploaded to the server, the file name, file id and document control declaration are saved to the application record.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.CommitmentUploadNote
data.value: This field is reserved for uploading the signed/authorized file containing declarations and commitments included in the application guide annex.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.PackageFileRequired
data.value: The document package file must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.AllGroupsRequired
data.value: All required document groups must be checked.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.DeclarationMustBeYes
data.value: The document declaration must be Yes.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.CommitmentFileRequired
data.value: The commitment file must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.SectionSaveInfo
data.value: Document upload operations are performed with the related file buttons.

data.name: Basvuru.Mali.AuditFileUploadNote
data.value: If the applicant is subject to independent audit, the audit file is uploaded here.

data.name: Basvuru.Mali.AuditFileRequired
data.value: The independent audit file must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Mali.ScaleDescription
data.value: The applicant's annual net sales revenue and total assets for the last two years are used. If there is a legal entity partner, the amounts calculated according to the shareholding ratio are included in the financial scale check.

data.name: Basvuru.Mali.ScaleLimitWarning
data.value: At least one of net sales revenue or total assets must be between {0} TL and {1} TL. (It is sufficient if either of the last 2 years meets the range)

data.name: Basvuru.Mali.ScaleCheckNotOk
data.value: The entered values do not meet the range yet.

data.name: Basvuru.Step.Ortaklik
data.value: Ownership and Authority - Shares and UBO

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.Required.5
data.value: Document confirming no bankruptcy, concordat or liquidation process

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.Required.6
data.value: Trade registry gazette, establishment and current status

data.name: Basvuru.Documents.RequiredSeparateDescription
data.value: Required documents will be uploaded as separate files. Criminal record documents are added per person, and each file is uploaded after the person is saved.

data.name: Basvuru.CevreselSosyal.Description
data.value: Prepared according to the new Annex V question set. The form opens only the relevant fields based on the nature of the investment; grey/out-of-scope cells in the document are not shown to the user.

data.name: Basvuru.CevreselSosyal.ScopeQuestion
data.value: Which of the following does the investment subject to the application include?

data.name: Basvuru.CevreselSosyal.ScopeNote
data.value: Based on the selection, Existing Enterprise and/or Planned Investment fields are opened. If a question relates only to the planned investment, the existing enterprise field is not shown.

data.name: Basvuru.CevreselSosyal.Declaration
data.value: I accept, declare and undertake that the information provided in this form is accurate, complete and consistent with current site conditions and/or approved project design parameters for new investments; and that the investment will comply with the legislation of the Republic of Turkey and the World Bank Environmental and Social Framework standards during implementation and operation. If false declarations or non-compliance are identified, corrective action, suspension of credit support or termination of the sub-project may be considered.

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Description
data.value: This section is designed so that the investment budget, production-sales information and annual operating expenses at full capacity can be entered step by step.

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Section.Budget
data.value: A. Total Investment Budget and Financing Sources

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Section.BudgetNote
data.value: Amounts are entered in TL. Row totals, investment total, financing sources total and difference are calculated automatically.

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Section.ProductionNote
data.value: For each product/product group, unit, current situation and year 1-10 projections are entered.

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Section.Expense
data.value: C. Annual Operating Expenses at Full Capacity

data.name: Basvuru.YatirimOzeti.Section.ExpenseNote
data.value: Expense item, quantity, unit price, fixed/variable ratios and amounts are calculated in the system.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Lead
data.value: System checks before submitting the application.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.SuccessText
data.value: The application appears ready for submission.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Detail.ApplicantLastNetSales
data.value: Applicant's last year net sales revenue:

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Detail.ControlLastNetSales
data.value: Control basis last year net sales revenue:

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Detail.ControlLastAssets
data.value: Control basis last year total assets:

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Detail.AnnualOperatingExpense
data.value: Annual operating expense at full capacity:

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.ActiveTwoYearsRequired
data.value: Whether the applicant has been active for the last 2 years must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.InvestmentAddressRequired
data.value: At least one investment implementation location must be entered.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.ExpenseTypeRequired
data.value: At least one requested expense type must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.InvestmentPurposeRequired
data.value: The purpose, activities and outputs of the investment must be entered.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.ValueChainStageRequired
data.value: At least one value chain stage must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.FinancialScaleRequired
data.value: Financial scale check must be suitable.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.AuditChoiceRequired
data.value: Whether the applicant is subject to independent audit must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.AuditFileRequired
data.value: Independent audit report must be uploaded.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.RelatedEnterpriseRequired
data.value: Related/partner enterprise relationship must be selected.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.PikkRequired
data.value: Eligible expense preliminary list must be completed.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.InvestmentSummaryRequired
data.value: Investment summary table must be completed.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.RequiredDocumentsRequired
data.value: All required documents must be uploaded.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.CriminalPeopleRequired
data.value: The list of persons subject to criminal record check must be created.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.CriminalFilesRequired
data.value: Criminal record files for persons subject to criminal record check must be uploaded.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.EsfRequired
data.value: Environmental and Social Data Form must be completed.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.EsfExclusion
data.value: Environmental-social excluded activity declaration is marked as Yes.

data.name: Basvuru.Summary.Error.CommitmentRequired
data.value: Commitment / Declarations document must be uploaded.

data.name: Basvuru.Applicant.Description
data.value: Identity, contact, activity and legal type information.

data.name: Basvuru.Field.TemsilIlzamKisilerReadonly
data.value: Person(s) authorized to represent and bind

data.name: Basvuru.Field.YonetimKuruluAdliSicilKisilerReadonly
data.value: Board members / additional persons subject to criminal record check

data.name: Basvuru.Placeholder.TemsilIlzamFromCriminalRecord
data.value: Generated from persons authorized to represent and bind entered in the criminal record section.

data.name: Basvuru.Placeholder.BoardMembersFromCriminalRecord
data.value: Generated from board members and additional persons subject to criminal record check entered in the criminal record section.

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.RoleOptions
data.value: Company Partner|Authorized to represent and bind|Board member|Additional Person Subject to Criminal Record Check

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.FileMissing
data.value: Criminal record is not uploaded, please upload

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.SavePersonFirst
data.value: Save the person before uploading the criminal record.

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.RequiredFields
data.value: TCKN, name, surname and role are required.

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.DuplicateTckn
data.value: Two criminal record persons cannot be saved with the same TCKN.

data.name: Basvuru.Criminal.Empty
data.value: No criminal record check person has been added.

data.name: Basvuru.Esf.SelectInvestmentScopeFirst
data.value: Please select whether the investment is modernization of an existing facility, a new facility, or both.

data.name: Basvuru.Esf.OpenedBySelection
data.value: The form has been opened according to your selection. Fields left grey in the document and not related to your selection are not shown.

data.name: Basvuru.Esf.PlannedOnlyNote
data.value: This question relates only to the planned investment; the existing enterprise field is not opened because it is grey in the document.

data.name: Basvuru.Esf.ExclusionWarning
data.value: Excluded activity warning: This answer may cause the investment to be evaluated negatively for eligibility.

data.name: Business.User.NotFoundOrPassive
data.value: User was not found or is inactive.

data.name: Business.User.CreateFailed
data.value: User record could not be created.

data.name: Business.User.InvalidCredentials
data.value: User code or password is incorrect.

data.name: Business.User.ReadFailed
data.value: User information could not be read.

data.name: Business.User.TestActiveUserNotFound
data.value: No active user was found for test login.

data.name: Business.User.TestUserReadFailed
data.value: User could not be read for test login.

data.name: Business.User.SimilarRecordExists
data.value: A similar user record exists, so the record cannot be created.

data.name: Business.Database.ConnectionSettingMissing
data.value: Database connection setting was not found.

data.name: Business.Company.UserNotRelated
data.value: This company is not related to the user.

data.name: Business.Company.ExistsButUserNotRelated
data.value: The company exists in the system but is not related to the user.

data.name: Business.Application.ViewUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to view this application.

data.name: Business.Application.NotFoundOrUnauthorized
data.value: Application record was not found or you are not authorized for this action.

data.name: Business.Application.CompanyUserNotRelated
data.value: The application company is not related to the user.

data.name: Business.Application.UboKycPartnerRequired
data.value: The partner must be saved before uploading the UBO-KYC document.

data.name: Business.Application.CriminalPersonRequiredBeforeUpload
data.value: The person must be saved before uploading the criminal record.

data.name: Business.File.ViewFilesUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to view files.

data.name: Business.File.ViewFileUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to view the file.

data.name: Business.File.ListReadFailed
data.value: File list could not be read.

data.name: Business.File.AddUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to add files.

data.name: Business.File.UpdateUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to update files.

data.name: Business.File.DeleteUnauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to delete files.

data.name: Business.File.ConnectionStringMissing
data.value: File management connection string is not defined.

data.name: Business.Pikk.EquipmentRowRequired
data.value: Because machine-equipment expense is selected, name and purpose of use must be entered in at least one machine/equipment row.

data.name: Business.Pikk.ConstructionRowRequired
data.value: Because construction expense is selected, name and purpose of use must be entered in at least one building/construction row.

data.name: Business.Esf.AnswersReadFailed
data.value: Environmental-social survey answers could not be read.

data.name: Business.Criminal.DuplicateTcknWithValue
data.value: More than one criminal record person cannot be saved with TCKN {0}.

data.name: Business.Address.DistrictNotInApplicationProvince
data.value: The selected district does not belong to the application province or is inactive.

data.name: Business.Address.SaveFailed
data.value: Application address could not be saved.

data.name: Business.Address.DeleteFailed
data.value: Application address could not be deleted.

data.name: Business.Partnership.ApplicationRequiredBeforeSave
data.value: Partnership information cannot be saved before the application record is created.

data.name: Business.Partnership.SaveFailed
data.value: Partnership information could not be saved.

data.name: Business.Documents.PackageDeclarationRequired
data.value: It must be declared that all required documents are included in a single document.

data.name: Business.Documents.RequiredGroupsUndefined
data.value: Required document groups are not defined.

data.name: Business.Documents.RequiredGroupsMustBeSent
data.value: Required document groups must be sent to the server.

data.name: Business.Documents.RequiredGroupsMustBeChecked
data.value: All required document groups must be checked.

data.name: Başvuru kayıtları listelenemedi.
data.value: Application records could not be listed.

data.name: Kullanıcı bilgisi okunamadı.
data.value: User information could not be read.

data.name: Başvuru dönemleri listelenemedi.
data.value: Application periods could not be listed.

data.name: İl listesi okunamadı.
data.value: Province list could not be read.

data.name: İlçe listesi okunamadı.
data.value: District list could not be read.

data.name: Değer zincirleri listelenemedi.
data.value: Value chains could not be listed.

data.name: Değer zinciri aşamaları listelenemedi.
data.value: Value chain stages could not be listed.

data.name: Başvuru kaydı okunamadı.
data.value: Application record could not be read.

data.name: Ortaklık bilgileri kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Partnership information could not be saved.

data.name: Ortak/pay sahibi bilgileri kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Partner/shareholder information could not be saved.

data.name: Başvuru dosyası kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Application file could not be saved.

data.name: Adli sicil kişileri kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Criminal record persons could not be saved.

data.name: Doküman paketi kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Document package could not be saved.

data.name: Taahhüt dosyası kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Commitment file could not be saved.

data.name: Bağımsız denetim dosyası kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Independent audit file could not be saved.

data.name: Uygulama adresi kaydedilemedi.
data.value: Application address could not be saved.

data.name: Uygulama adresi silinemedi.
data.value: Application address could not be deleted.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.Lead
data.value: Total shareholding percentage and private sector share are calculated by the system based on partner/shareholder rows. Financial data is not requested for natural person partners; financial data for legal entity partners is collected separately and included in the financial scale check according to the shareholding percentage.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.PrivateShareCalculated
data.value: Private sector share (%) - calculated by system

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.RelatedEnterpriseNote
data.value: If a related/partner enterprise relationship is declared, basic financial information and documents for this enterprise are also collected. Financial information of legal entity partners is included in the calculation separately through the ownership table above.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.UboKycMissing
data.value: UBO-KYC document is not uploaded, please upload it

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.UboKycSavePartnerFirst
data.value: Save the partner before uploading the UBO-KYC document.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.TotalShareExceeded
data.value: Total partner/shareholder share rate cannot exceed 100%.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.TotalShareExpected
data.value: Total share rate: {0}%. The total is expected to be 100.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.RequiredNameIdentity
data.value: Partner name/title and TCKN/TIN must be entered.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.DuplicateIdentity
data.value: Two partners cannot be saved with the same TCKN/TIN.

data.name: Basvuru.Ortaklik.LegalIncludedRateRequired
data.value: Included rate must be entered for a legal entity partner.

data.name: Birim.Description
data.value: User units, center/provincial status, province code, and display order are managed here.

data.name: Business.Authorization.SystemAdminRequired
data.value: System administrator permission is required for this action.

data.name: Business.Unit.ListFailed
data.value: The unit list could not be read.

data.name: Business.Unit.NotFound
data.value: The unit could not be found.

data.name: Business.Unit.SaveFailed
data.value: The unit could not be saved.

data.name: Business.Unit.DeactivateFailed
data.value: The unit could not be deactivated.

data.name: Business.Unit.ProvinceRequired
data.value: Province code must be selected for a provincial unit.

data.name: Business.Unit.ProvinceNotFound
data.value: The selected province code could not be found.

data.name: Kullanici.Description
data.value: Search, add and manage user permissions

data.name: Kullanici.SearchPrompt
data.value: Enter search criteria and press Search.

data.name: Kullanici.NoResults
data.value: No users matched the search criteria.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.Sent
data.value: The password setup link was sent to the user.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.MailBody
data.value:
Hello {0},

Click here to set your password. The link is valid for five minutes and can only be used once.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.Description
data.value: Set a new password for your account.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.Invalid
data.value: The password link is invalid, used or expired.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.Weak
data.value: The password must be at least 8 characters and sufficiently strong.

data.name: Kullanici.PasswordLink.Success
data.value: Your password has been set. You can now sign in.
